DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $426.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/29/05 IS CONTINUED TO 11/7/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED WITH THE EXCEPTION OF VIDEOTAPING THE DEPOSITION OF PATTY SKOURAS ONLY. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING.
